Burlesque (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $39,440,655Details
International Box Office $51,112,020
Worldwide Box Office $90,552,675
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $31,999,653
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,056,219
Total $38,055,872
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A small town girl moves to LA and goes to work as a waitress in a burlesque club. She decides to become a dancer and makes friends with one dancer and becomes the rival of another. Drama ensues - followed shortly by uplifting triumph.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,947,744 (30.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$55,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,037 opening theaters/3,037 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $59,772,779

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 24th, 2010 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: January 14th, 2021 (Wide) (Australia)
November 26th, 2023 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: March 1st, 2011 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content including several suggestive dance routines, partial nudity, language and some thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2145, 11/3/2010)
Running Time: 116 minutes
Plot point: Burlesque, Dancing, Musicians, Performing Arts
Social setting: Jazz, Music Industry
Subgenre: Musical Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: De Line Pictures, Screen Gems
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
